common_interrogate.name: Interrogation
common_interrogate.description: Pose a sharp question to a target MP, dealing 15 reputation damage.
common_interrogate.flavor_text: "Sir, would you please explain to the House — where has your conscience gone?"

common_rebut.name: Rebuttal
common_rebut.description: Negate one interrogation attack targeting you.
common_rebut.flavor_text: "The honorable member's accusations are baseless and slanderous!"

common_brief_speech.name: Brief Speech
common_brief_speech.description: Deliver a brief speech in Parliament, restoring 5 reputation.
common_brief_speech.flavor_text: "Brevity is the soul of wit." — Shakespeare

common_procedural_motion.name: Procedural Motion
common_procedural_motion.description: Raise a procedural motion to interrupt debate; one opponent cannot play attack cards next turn.
common_procedural_motion.flavor_text: The Speaker's gavel falls. All debate ceases.

common_gather_intel.name: Gather Intelligence
common_gather_intel.description: View one card from the target MP's hand.
common_gather_intel.flavor_text: In the corridors of Parliament, information travels faster than bills.

common_public_appeal.name: Public Appeal
common_public_appeal.description: Make a public appeal, restoring 8 reputation.

common_pamphlet.name: Political Pamphlet
common_pamphlet.description: Distribute an attack pamphlet, dealing 8 reputation damage to the target.
common_pamphlet.flavor_text: The printing press is mightier than the sword.

common_lobby.name: Lobby
common_lobby.description: Lobby in the Parliament hall; your vote weight +0.5 for the next vote.
common_lobby.flavor_text: Real politics happens not in the chamber, but in the corridors.

common_filibuster.name: Filibuster
common_filibuster.description: Conduct a filibuster; you take no attack damage this turn.
common_filibuster.flavor_text: He has been speaking non-stop for four hours. No one has the energy to rebut.

common_point_of_order.name: Point of Order
common_point_of_order.description: Raise a point of order; negate one utility card targeting you.
common_point_of_order.flavor_text: "Mr. Speaker! This is a grave violation of parliamentary procedure!"

common_withdraw.name: Strategic Withdrawal
common_withdraw.description: Temporarily withdraw from debate; take 50% reduced damage for 1 turn.
common_withdraw.flavor_text: Sometimes, absence is the best strategy.

common_petition.name: Petition
common_petition.description: Submit a citizens' petition, restoring 10 reputation.
common_petition.flavor_text: A petition with twelve thousand signatures cannot be ignored.

common_compromise.name: Compromise
common_compromise.description: Compromise with an opponent; both restore 5 reputation.
common_compromise.flavor_text: The art of politics is the art of compromise.

common_rumor.name: Spread Rumors
common_rumor.description: Spread rumors about the target, dealing 10 reputation damage.
common_rumor.flavor_text: In London's coffeehouses, rumors sell better than truth.

common_tax_debate.name: Tax Debate
common_tax_debate.description: Initiate a tax debate, dealing 5 reputation damage to all opponents.
common_tax_debate.flavor_text: "No taxation without representation!" — A debate that never ends.

common_moral_appeal.name: Moral Appeal
common_moral_appeal.description: Appeal on moral grounds, restoring 12 reputation.
common_moral_appeal.flavor_text: "Fellow members, how can we turn a blind eye to the workers' suffering?"

common_backroom_deal.name: Backroom Deal
common_backroom_deal.description: Strike a backroom deal with another MP; both gain 10 gold.
common_backroom_deal.flavor_text: The door closes. No records. No witnesses. Only deals.

common_call_to_order.name: Call to Order
common_call_to_order.description: Demand order in the House; remove all temporary effects.
common_call_to_order.flavor_text: The Speaker's authority brooks no challenge. At least nominally.

common_quick_wit.name: Quick Wit
common_quick_wit.description: Deflect an attack with a witty response; negate 10 damage.
common_quick_wit.flavor_text: "The gentleman's logic is as tangled as his hairstyle."

common_opening_statement.name: Opening Statement
common_opening_statement.description: A well-prepared opening statement; all your card effects +20% this turn.
common_opening_statement.flavor_text: A good start is half the battle. Especially in Parliament.

common_expose_scandal.name: Expose Scandal
common_expose_scandal.description: Expose the target's unsavory past, dealing 25 reputation damage.
common_expose_scandal.flavor_text: "Gentlemen, let me tell you what this member did in Yorkshire..."

common_endorse.name: Endorsement
common_endorse.description: Publicly endorse a target MP, restoring 20 reputation. Can revive politically dead allies.
common_endorse.flavor_text: A powerful ally is worth more than a thousand words.

uncommon_coalition.name: Form Coalition
uncommon_coalition.description: Form a temporary coalition with the target; both gain +5 attack this turn.
uncommon_coalition.flavor_text: The enemy of my enemy is my friend. At least for this vote.

uncommon_whip.name: Party Whip
uncommon_whip.description: Apply party discipline; if the target is an ally, deal 20 damage and break the alliance.
uncommon_whip.flavor_text: "Remember your position. Remember who put you here."

uncommon_propaganda.name: Propaganda Campaign
uncommon_propaganda.description: Launch a propaganda campaign; deal 8 reputation damage to all non-allies.
uncommon_propaganda.flavor_text: The power of a front page is no less than a parliamentary vote.

uncommon_double_agent.name: Double Agent
uncommon_double_agent.description: View all of the target's hand cards and steal one.
uncommon_double_agent.flavor_text: Every MP's valet can be bought. The question is only the price.

uncommon_crisis.name: Manufactured Crisis
uncommon_crisis.description: Create a political crisis; all MPs (including yourself) lose 10 reputation.

uncommon_amnesty.name: Amnesty
uncommon_amnesty.description: Declare amnesty; remove all negative effects from the field.
uncommon_amnesty.flavor_text: "Let bygones be bygones. Today, we start anew."

uncommon_royal_favor.name: Royal Favor
uncommon_royal_favor.description: Gain the King's attention; restore 15 reputation and gain 15 gold.
uncommon_royal_favor.flavor_text: George III may be unwell, but his favor is still priceless.

uncommon_press_leak.name: Press Leak
uncommon_press_leak.description: Leak confidential documents to the press; deal 18 reputation damage to the target.
uncommon_press_leak.flavor_text: A Times front page can end a political career.

uncommon_strike.name: Strike
uncommon_strike.description: Call a workers' strike; the target cannot use utility cards this turn.
uncommon_strike.flavor_text: Factories silent. Docks still. The whole city waits.

uncommon_embargo.name: Embargo
uncommon_embargo.description: Impose economic sanctions on the target; they lose 20 gold.
uncommon_embargo.flavor_text: Napoleon's Continental Blockade taught Britain a lesson: trade is a weapon.

uncommon_charity.name: Charitable Act
uncommon_charity.description: Spend 20 gold; restore 15 reputation for yourself and one ally.
uncommon_charity.flavor_text: Charity is the duty of the rich — and a PR move.

uncommon_inspection.name: Surprise Inspection
uncommon_inspection.description: Conduct a surprise inspection on the target; reveal one hand card and deal 12 damage.
uncommon_inspection.flavor_text: "By order of the King, open your ledgers."

uncommon_war_debt.name: War Debt
uncommon_war_debt.description: Attack citing war debts; deal 20 damage to the wealthiest MP.
uncommon_war_debt.flavor_text: The bill for the Napoleonic Wars must be paid by someone.

rare_impeachment.name: Impeachment
rare_impeachment.description: Initiate impeachment proceedings; deal 30 reputation damage to the target. Requires majority vote.
rare_impeachment.flavor_text: "Before God and Parliament, I accuse this man of treason."

rare_martial_law.name: Martial Law
rare_martial_law.description: Declare martial law; no players may use attack cards this turn.
rare_martial_law.flavor_text: His Majesty, in the name of national security, has suspended all parliamentary debate.

rare_revolution.name: Call to Revolution
rare_revolution.description: Call for revolution! Deal 35 damage to the highest-reputation MP; restore 15 to yourself.
rare_revolution.flavor_text: "Liberté, Égalité, Fraternité!" — The French storm has crossed the Channel.

rare_political_assassination.name: Political Assassination
rare_political_assassination.description: Launch a fatal attack on the target; deal 40 reputation damage. You also lose 20.
rare_political_assassination.flavor_text: In 1812, Prime Minister Spencer Perceval was assassinated in the House lobby.

rare_reform_act.name: Reform Act
rare_reform_act.description: Push the Reform Act; all MPs with reputation below 30 are restored to 30.
rare_reform_act.flavor_text: The tide of reform is unstoppable. It's only a matter of time.

rare_corn_law.name: Corn Laws
rare_corn_law.description: Push the Corn Laws; all worker characters lose 15 reputation, factory owners gain 15 gold.
rare_corn_law.flavor_text: The price of bread holds the fate of an entire nation.

rare_factory_act.name: Factory Act
rare_factory_act.description: Push the Factory Act; all factory owner characters lose 15 gold, workers restore 15 reputation.
rare_factory_act.flavor_text: "A ten-year-old child should not work sixteen hours in a factory."

rare_habeas_corpus.name: Habeas Corpus
rare_habeas_corpus.description: Invoke Habeas Corpus; immediately restore a silenced MP's ability to act and restore 20 reputation.
rare_habeas_corpus.flavor_text: "No free man shall be imprisoned without lawful judgment." — The cornerstone of English law.

rare_no_confidence.name: Vote of No Confidence
rare_no_confidence.description: Call a vote of no confidence; if a majority supports it, the target is politically eliminated.
rare_no_confidence.flavor_text: "This House has lost confidence in you. Please leave with dignity."

rare_grand_coalition.name: Grand Coalition
rare_grand_coalition.description: Form a grand coalition with all surviving MPs for 1 turn.
rare_grand_coalition.flavor_text: When the nation faces crisis, all factions must unite.

rare_espionage.name: Espionage
rare_espionage.description: View all opponents' hands and discard one card of your choice.
rare_espionage.flavor_text: The Tower of London holds not only prisoners, but the empire's secrets.

rare_public_trial.name: Public Trial
rare_public_trial.description: Put the target on public trial; deal 20 damage. If they used an attack card this turn, deal 20 more.
rare_public_trial.flavor_text: Justice must be seen. And seen by all.

rare_royal_decree.name: Royal Decree
rare_royal_decree.description: Issue a royal decree in the King's name; restore 25 reputation and gain 25 gold.
rare_royal_decree.flavor_text: "By royal decree of His Majesty the King —"

rare_blockade.name: Blockade
rare_blockade.description: Blockade the target; they cannot gain gold or draw cards for 2 turns.
rare_blockade.flavor_text: The guns of the Royal Navy are the best negotiating tool.

rare_diplomatic_immunity.name: Diplomatic Immunity
rare_diplomatic_immunity.description: Gain diplomatic immunity; immune to all damage for 2 turns.
rare_diplomatic_immunity.flavor_text: "I represent a sovereign nation. Your laws do not apply to me."

thomas_unity.name: Unity
thomas_unity.description: For each worker ally, your defense effect +10.
thomas_unity.flavor_text: "Workers of the world, unite! You have nothing to lose but your chains."

richard_bribe.name: Bribery
richard_bribe.description: Spend 30 gold to silence the target for 1 turn; they cannot speak or use attack cards.
richard_bribe.flavor_text: "Every man has his price. I'm just more direct about it."

edward_scoop.name: Scoop
edward_scoop.description: Expose the target's secret mission. If they have a hidden identity, reveal it.
edward_scoop.flavor_text: "The truth is a journalist's weapon. And I never run out of ammunition."

george_fury.name: Fury
george_fury.description: Deal double damage (30 points), but you also lose 10 reputation.
george_fury.flavor_text: "They destroyed our livelihood. Tonight, we destroy their machines!"

legendary_peterloo.name: Peterloo Massacre
legendary_peterloo.description: Recreate the Peterloo tragedy; deal 25 damage to all opponents, but lose 15 reputation yourself.
legendary_peterloo.flavor_text: August 16, 1819, St Peter's Field, Manchester. Cavalry charged into the peaceful assembly.

legendary_magna_carta.name: Spirit of Magna Carta
legendary_magna_carta.description: Invoke the spirit of Magna Carta; all MPs restore 20 reputation and remove all negative effects.
legendary_magna_carta.flavor_text: "No free man shall be seized or imprisoned except by lawful judgment." — 1215

COLLECT_50.name: 🏆 Card Collector
COLLECT_50.description: Collect 50% of all unique cards (28 cards)

ADD_FRIEND.name: 🏆 Political Alliance
ADD_FRIEND.description: Join a multiplayer room for the first time

ATTACK_STREAK_5.name: 🏆 Master Debater
ATTACK_STREAK_5.description: Play 5 attack cards in a row in one match

COLLECT_200.name: 🏆 Card Connoisseur
COLLECT_200.description: Collect 80% of all unique cards (45 cards)

PERFECT_VOTE.name: 🏆 Voice of the People
PERFECT_VOTE.description: Receive unanimous support in a voting phase

ALL_ROLES.name: 🏆 Versatile Politician
ALL_ROLES.description: Win at least once with every character

DEFENSE_MASTER.name: 🏆 Iron Defense
DEFENSE_MASTER.description: Successfully defend 10 attacks in one match

COMEBACK_WIN.name: 🏆 Comeback King
COMEBACK_WIN.description: Win by coming from behind in the final round

PACIFIST.name: 🏆 The Pacifist
PACIFIST.description: Win a match without using any attack cards

ALL_ATTACK.name: 🏆 Warmonger
ALL_ATTACK.description: Win a match using only attack cards

EASTER_EGG.name: 🏆 The Historian
EASTER_EGG.description: Discover a hidden Easter egg in the game

vote_for_winner.name: Good Bet
vote_for_winner.description: Vote for the winning option 2 times

survive_to_end.name: Standing Firm
survive_to_end.description: Survive to the end of 2 games

thomas.name: Thomas the Worker
thomas.description: Worker leader. Unity skill: More allies, stronger defense

richard.name: Richard the Factory Owner
richard.description: Factory owner. Bribery skill: Silence opponents with gold

edward.name: Edward the Journalist
edward.description: Journalist. Scoop skill: Expose opponents' secrets

george.name: George the Luddite
george.description: Luddite. Fury skill: Deal double damage

errors.player_silenced: You are silenced and cannot act
